question: How long had I been using the new area rug when I rearranged my living room furniture?
gold_answer: One week. Answers ranging from 7 days to 10 days are also acceptable.
reasoning_summary: User got the new area rug on 2023-04-26 (a month ago from question date 2023-05-26). User rearranged furniture on 2023-05-05 (three weeks ago from question date). The difference is 9 days, approximately 1 week.

required_slots.name: date when user started using the new area rug
date when user rearranged living room furniture
